title: Add automatic fresh-context verifier agent workflow
summary: Implemented automatic fresh verifier stage for explicit task close: builds compact verifier prompt from task/context, spawns read-only `pi --mode json --no-session` with read/grep/find/ls tools, parses deterministic JSON verdict, appends verifier evidence, and blocks closure on non-pass; smoke tests disable nested verifier via env.
issues: Automatic verifier currently runs on explicit `codewiki_task` close; lifecycle `update` pass path remains a follow-up if strict auto-verify is required there too.

title: Expose CodeWiki capability manifest and think-code boundary
summary: Implemented CodeWiki capability manifest in gateway and runtime spec. Manifest names semantic capability classes for state, task mutation, session notes, validated transactions, and derived rebuilds with args/result schema names, read/write classification, affected writes, and audit fields. Spec documents think-code fallback and generated-state write delegation rules.

Implemented CodeWiki capability manifest in gateway and runtime spec. Manifest names semantic capability classes for state, task mutation, session notes, validated transactions, and derived rebuilds with args/result schema names, read/write classification, affected writes, and audit fields. Spec documents think-code fallback and generated-state write delegation rules.
